pr.title: Non-record: JEPA EMA teacher + attention predictor + MLP3x + 10L

output.summary: Adds JEPA auxiliary loss with EMA teacher, causal attention predictor, and CE-dominant schedule on a 10L MLP3x model to stabilize representations.
techniques: JEPA cosine auxiliary loss blended with CE, annealing to pure CE late
EMA teacher provides stable targets discarded before serialization
Causal attention predictor doubles as final projection head
